name: Proxmox VM Power Control
author: IDKMANAGER
description: Orchestrated, dependency-aware power control of Proxmox VMs/LXC across a cluster. Models a cross-node dependency graph (depends_on + order/suborder), runs the operator pre-flight checklist (cluster/host/storage/boot/posture), and health-gates every start/stop step. Reuses PegaProx's authenticated cluster manager.
